_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: The migration of 8814 MPNST cells was stimulated 1.5-fold when ADM at 10 μmol/L was added to DMEM with 10% FBS (P < 0.0001)...a 6-fold increase in migration was seen (P < 0.0001)
details: Migration stimulated 1.5-fold when ADM at 10 μmol/L was added to DMEM with 10% FBS (P < 0.0001); 6-fold increase in migration with serum-free conditioned medium compared to serum-free DMEM (P < 0.0001)
